Compliance.description: ICASA licensed ECS/ECNS, fulfilling USAOs (Thusong centres rollout), no recent fines or major violations.

Customer Satisfaction.description: Low ratings on HelloPeter/Trustpilot (1.3-1.6/5), complaints on billing/service despite good network availability.

Product Value.description: Competitive data-heavy plans, Night Surfer bonus, uncapped LTE options, good value vs competitors.

Innovation.description: Revamped MyTelkom app, data-centric plans (Night Surfer, bundles), 5G expansion, MVNO platform, strong subscriber growth.

Customer Support.description: Phone, stores, online chat, app; reviewed as average; billing disputes are main issue.

Accessibility & Security.description: National coverage; POPIA compliance as listed entity; app-based account management; standard security practices.

pricing.name: Pricing
pricing.cost: Pricing: Smart 1GB R79/mo; Smart 5GB R149/mo; SmartBroadband unlimited from R249/mo

socialSentiment.summary: Data value praised; billing and service complaints dominate social/HelloPeter.
